productDisplayName: Guess Women Party Girl Red Watch
description: guess watches are creative masterpieces with absolute durability. They have proven themselves in the art of creating high quality timepieces, by combining the epitome of style with impeccable technology. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Round Metal case with Swarovski crystals encrusted in the bezel and a red leather strap with the guess logo in red crystal embellishments on the dial Tang clasp with a silver dial Polished hands to mark sub dials Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or in mild rain
